title: Senior Doctor - Solara Active Pharma Ventures Solutions - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Solara Active Pharma Ventures Solutions - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
Solara Active Pharma Ventures Solutions has an exciting opening for a Senior Doctor at our Patna office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Solara Active Pharma Ventures Solutions:
Solara Active Pharma Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in NABH Standards

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Solara Active Pharma Ventures Solutions!
